title: Field of Man-Sized Holes
description:
The sudden sight of a massive field, [jitter]gouged with large outlines of bodies[/jitter], stops you in your tracks.

One of these outlines matches your own.

[sine][orange]It's perfect...[/orange][/sine]

options.title: Resist
options.description: Remove [blue]2[/blue] cards from your [gold]Deck[/gold]. Add [red]Normality[/red] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].

conditions: Requires at least one card in your deck that can be enchanted with Perfect Fit
notes: This is a multi-page event with distinct flavor text after each choice. Choosing "Resist" removes 2 cards from your deck and adds a Normality curse, reflecting the character's decision to walk past their destined hole. Choosing "Enter Your Hole" allows you to enchant one card with the Perfect Fit enchantment, suggesting a mystical acceptance of fate.
